_note: Polygons generated by Claude (claude-opus-4-7) walking through all 90 Seattle neighborhoods one by one. Each polygon is the model's best recall of where the neighborhood's actual boundary runs — following arterials, the freeway, shorelines, ridge lines as best the model can reconstruct from training-text exposure. No external lookup. Vertices not constrained to integer-coordinate lat/lon grid. The result is the model's honest mental boundary file.
